item.title: Sometimes you have to do exactly that at home
item.dc:creator: bexxMaker

item.title: He delivers
item.description: Damn straight. Being a single dad, I explain that housekeeping is all our jobs. That we both chip in to do the chores that have to be done. It was like this when his mother was alive and still today. One of my proudest moments was last year he went to a friends for a sleepover/play video games/etc. The mother of the friend called me the next day and told me what a well mannered, polite boy he is and how he helped clean the table after dinner. My smile could have lit up the entire neighborhood.
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: the legend of cat dad
item.dc:creator: pilomotor

item.title: She's done
item.description:
Finished up painting this 3D printed mask. Just going to hit it with some shadows from the airbrush. Had fun painting this one and it feels good to see a final product.
Loving the gold File designer by Pipe Cox Printed on an FLSun V400
item.dc:creator: vudumommajuju

item.title: A Mega-Dump of Music from the '80s Airwaves
item.description:
The Bangles - Walk Like an Egyptian A handy dandy Spotify playlist for this Mega Dump - https://open.spotify.com/playlist/0GPBvTbhOo8QmXHmhtiAoN?si=013d3d1996734285
Bobby McFerrin - Don't Worry, Be Happy
Madonna - Lucky Star
Taylor Dane - Tell It To My Heart
Falco - Rock Me Amadeus
Belinda Carlisle - Heaven is a Place on Earth
Dead or Alive - You Spin Me Round (Like a Record)
The GoGos - Vacation
Harold Faltermeyer - Axel F
Sinéad O'Connor - Nothing Compares 2 U
Eurythmics - Would I Lie to You?
Toto - Africa
Joan Jett (and the Blackhearts) - I Hate Myself for Loving You
Billy Joel - Uptown Girl
Tracy Chapman - Fast Car
Beastie Boys - No Sleep Til Brooklyn
Madonna - Into the Groove
Queen - One Vision
OPUS - Live is Life
Cyndi Lauper - Girls Just Wanna Have Fun (EDIT: A handy dandy Spotify playlist for this collection https://open.spotify.com/playlist/0zx1WMC0oJD2nRwSOrBU4T ) The hit songs from 30 years ago, Wayback in 1993 - https://imgur.com/gallery/tuAN3R4
Huey Lewis and the News - Back in Time
Eddy Grant - Electric Avenue
WHAM - Wake Me Up (Before You Go Go)
Simple Minds - Don't You (Forget About Me)
Dolly Parton and Kenny Rogers - Islands in the Stream
Billy Idol - White Wedding
Sheena Easton - The Lover in Me
Dexys Midnight Runner - Come on Eileen
Bruce Springsteen - Dancing in the Dark
Whitney Houston - So Emotional
The Clash - Rock the Casbah
Elton John - I'm Still Standing
Tina Turner - We Don't Need Another Hero
Enya - Orinoco Flow
Pink Floyd - Another Brick in the Wall (Part 2)
aha - Take on Me
Thomas Dolby - She Blinded Me With Science
Huey Lewis and the News - The Power of Love
George Michael - Faith
Toni Basil - Mickey
Madonna - Holiday
Chris Issak - Wicked Game
The Pointer Sisters - Neutron Dance
Spandau Ballet - True
Dire Straits - Money for Nothing
RUN DMC - Mary Mary
Katrina and the Waves - Walking on Sunshine
Culture Club - Karma Chameleon
Duran Duran - The Wild Boys
Michael Jackson - Bllie Jean
Debbie Harry - Call Me A handy dandy Spotify playlist for this collection - https://open.spotify.com/playlist/3AjwzxqE0t0vi8D92q7q5r Wayback in 73 - https://imgur.com/gallery/2rlT8Yh Wayback in 83 - https://imgur.com/gallery/T1CGaYx Wayback in 85 - https://imgur.com/gallery/lrddmXp Wayback in 88 - https://imgur.com/gallery/qBqeSu1 Wayback in 93 - https://imgur.com/gallery/tuAN3R4 Wayback in 95 - https://imgur.com/gallery/KkckKb3 Wayback in 98 - https://imgur.com/gallery/2qki0gA Wayback in 03 - https://imgur.com/gallery/pyMZXVP
The B-52s - Rock Lobster
DeBarge - Rhythm of the Night
Glenn Frey - The Heat is On
Robert Palmer - Simply Irresistible
Poison - Every Rose Has Its Thorn
Duran Duran - A View to a Kill
Prince - Raspberry Beret
Elton John - Candle in the Wind
Cyndi Lauper - Good Enough (The Goonies)
Céline Dion - Where Does My Heart Beat Now?
Madonna - Like a Virgin
Weird Al Yankovic - Like a Surgeon
Cher - I Found Someone
Kylie Minogue - Locomotion A handy dandy Spotify playlist for this collection: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/0aUVNGPFAuKN2MiEyHTR2K Wayback in 1973 - https://imgur.com/gallery/2rlT8Yh Wayback in 1983 - https://imgur.com/gallery/T1CGaYx Wayback in 1993 - https://imgur.com/gallery/tuAN3R4 Wayback in 1998 - https://imgur.com/gallery/2qki0gA
Sheena Easton - Telefone
Mike Oldfield and Maggie Reilly - Moonlight Shadow
Chaka Khan - Ain't Nobody
Rose Laurens - Africa
Bell Biv DeVoe - Poison
Guns N' Roses - Sweet Child O' Mine
RUN DMC - Run's House
Dio - Rainbow in the Dark
David Bowie - Let's Dance
Sandra - Maria Magdalena
The Beach Boys - Kokomo
Stetsasonic - Talkin' All That Jazz
Pat Benatar - We Belong
NWA - Fuck Tha Police I can't imagine why this particular song never recieved an official music video like the others on the album
Paula Abdul - Opposites Attract
Quiet Riot - Cum on Feel the Noize
Technotronic - Pump Up the Jam
Olivia Newton John - Twist of Fate
REO Speedwagon - Can't Fight This Feeling
Madonna - Crazy for You
Huey Lewis & The News - Perfect World
Duran Duran - Hungry Like the Wolf
Weird Al Yankovic - Dare to Be Stupid
Pat Benatar - All Fired Up
Corey Hart - Never Surrender
George Michael - Careless Whisper
Michael Sembello - Maniac
Daryl Hall & John Oates - Out Of Touch
Cyndi Lauper - All Through the Night
Foreigner - I Want to Know What Love Is
Jon Bon Jovi - Blaze Of Glory
Weird Al Yankovic - Money for Nothing (Beverly Hills)
Ofra Haza - Im Nin'Alu
Alphaville - Forever Young
Rick Astley - Never Gonna Give You Up
Starship - We Built this City
Sting and the Police - Every Breath You Take
Madonna - Holiday
Michael Jackson - Beat It

Faith No More - Epic
Hall and Oates - Maneater
Pat Benatar - Love is a Battlefield
a-Ha - Stay On These Roads

Sananda Maitreya - Sign Your Name

Slick Rick - Children's Story

Anthrax, Public Enemy - Bring Tha Noize

George Harrison - Got My Mind Set on You
Bobby Brown - My Prerogative

item.title: Goth 2B Cosplay Transformation tutorial - YuzuPyon
item.description: Source : Cosplayer : https://www.instagram.com/yuzu.pyon Artist : https://www.instagram.com/yoracrab Thank you for your support on my Goth 2B post yesterday, here's a transformation video tutorial for those interested in the steps to get into Cosplay!! Let me know if you have any other questions! Have a great day all :D -Yuzu Music : BMTH - limousine

item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: When you think you finally have a date.
item.description: Woman in my massage therapy class asked me out, talked for a few weeks while she was planning a date (her idea), and she admitted today that she doesn’t want to do it anymore because I have a collection of stuffed animals that are on a shelf in my bedroom. I was feeling quite excited since I basically never get matches on dating sites, so I’m feeling pretty bummed out and a bit like a loser. Still have to see her class every week for 5 more months too. F. FP EDIT: wow, didn't expect this to get that much attention. For the record I'm not looking for people to roast this person, I like her a person and we're going to interact for the foreseeable future. I'm just trying to figure out why this whole situation is making me feel like shit. 2nd edit: been asked a few times so here is the collection: https://imgur.com/gallery/y7MtRLO TLDR: Not mad at lady, why do I feel like shit?
item.dc:creator: saeheria

item.title: 6 weeks.
item.description: I won't lie, I've been wanting on and off a cold beer the last couple of days, but my health is improving too much for me to want one anyway.

item.title: TheFreePizzaDude is back!
item.description:
MrPuckett here excited for today's FreePizzaDude post! If you'd like to send food to an Imgurian going through a tough time, there are 2 easy ways on this post -
You can find a request for food in the comments, reply to them, then send a DM to get an order set up Or you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and one of the Angels will send the food for you!
If you'd like one of us to send the food for you - https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
And here's how you'd send it yourself! Any questions as an Angel? Just shoot us a message! We'll be on this username until 6pm central
The Pucketts are here to show you how it works for requests
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! We'll have helpers on the post for 6 hours
13,489 meals since we started 819 grocery orders sent 6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! ... Today's Pizza Tally 122 1st, 2nd and 3rd by Pizza Angel @AyatollahBahloni 130 4th and 5th by Pizza Angel @BadPunsAPlenty 135 6th, 7th, 8th, 9th and 10th by Pizza Angel @Grim42 150 11th, 12th, 13th and 14th by @OP 155 15th by Pizza Angel @grim42 200 16th and 17th by Pizza Angel @BadPunsAplenty 230 18th, 19th, 20th and 21st by @OP 250 22nd by Pizza Angel @pot314 325 Michael Jordan, Kobe Bryant, 25th and 26th by @OP 345 27th and 28th by Pizza Angel @meteredlines 400 29th, 30th and 31st by Pizza Angel @IrvingSchwinglepuck 405 32nd by Pizza Angel @pot314 415 33rd by Pizza Angel @TheCraicen 425 34th by Pizza Angel @tiddlywinks247 430 35th by Pizza Angel @StabbyTheCat 440 36th and 37th by Pizza Angel @morganVPI 500 38th, 39th, 40th and 41st by Pizza Angel @ITakeQuotesOutOfContext 510 The Meaning of Life, the Universe, and Everything, 43rd and 44th by Pizza Angel @morganVPI 525 45th, 46th and 47th by Pizza Angel @morganVPI 530 48th by Pizza Angel @StabbyTheCat 540 49th and 50th by Pizza Angel @WeberQs ... Alright everyone that's it for OP Today we sent out 50 meals! That's 13,541 meals since we started 819 grocery orders sent Well done everyone, see you next week!
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude

item.title: Meme Library: Volume 34
item.description:
Hello and welcome to another meme dump, my imgur friends. The screeching bird woman is here to drop off another volume of memes. Let us view them.
Probably got my own suite down there with all the absolutely terrible shit I've found funny in my life so far
As long as your adult responsibilities are taken care of, just let people fucken enjoy their hobbies, man
All the damn time. I can just visualize the friendship meter going into the red like I'm playing the Sims
Nope, can't come back from that one
The humor masks the pain
Just another day in 'Murica
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
s p o o k y t i m e
I'm sorry I don't understand??
Oh boy it's almost time
shit
mmm, breadsticks
that's a zoinks from me too, Scooby
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAnd that's all for this dump. I'll see you in the next one, my dear imgur friends. Until then, don't forget to stay awesome. Have a lovely weekend.
item.dc:creator: SecretHarpy

item.title: Where do Renaissance fairs come from?
item.dc:creator: countervail247365

item.title: Backlogged memes (cropping is for suckers)
item.description:
Actually I don’t think these have any cropping issues but we shall see bc that would be a first
This is peak internet culture
Even more so tbh. I probably won’t get crushed by a dark magic user in a wild power grab but I have DEFINITELY been on the wrong end of a small town white dudes attention
That’s the advice I usually give but I don’t run an advice column for a reason
Yeah well she’s training too, every night, so you’re SOL my dude
Yeah why not he seems chill
Any rock can cause negative energy if you throw it hard enough!
If you don’t know this series…..go read it.
Next week the daycare is just taking a vacay. Too bad they said. Keep your kid at home they said. What the fuck am I supposed to do with him here????
This right here is my entire vibe
I wish I could
You can actually do this in like 3 hours with cookies in Texas. Just put them on your windshield
This is the closest I’ve ever come to going viral and the comments are hilarious. This one lady was lecturing me about how a toddler shouldn’t be breastfeeding still. Total whoosh.
To be completely fair. The way they phrased this made it sound very positive when it definitely isn’t
Idk what this is but it’s rad.
More like preheating your cooch amirite
I should write this book
Are they not? Have I been making basketballs wrong?
I wanna say @PyroDragon did the commentary?
Oh, I’m looking
My body wants revenge, chocolate, and a nap. Basically those 3 things 24/7. And then of course there’s my mind which is just constantly screaming MAKE IT STOP
Ooooooo yes please
This dragon is my husband reincarnated.
….mmmmyello?
Is this a terminator?
Fantastic work by the species. A+.
Yes.
It was Eddie from IT thinking that btw. I’m reading IT and damn is it good. Like wasaaay better than I expected.
Why would anyone have pants on in their own house
Love the pun so much
I’d have very good yelp reviews. But also prison.
I run in a lot of reader circles and let me tell you. This is absolutely true. Very unrealistic that nobody wanted to bang this guy.
Promotion.
It never makes me feel better and yet I always do it. Like. Watch this. I’ve been super depressed lately, I think my new meds aren’t working, and it feels like everything is pointless and no one gives a shit if I finish my books and book covers or not. See? It did nothing.
It is actually
AI is coming for all the wrong jobs. Like gurl take out my trash for me so I can write my own books.
I want all of them
This is Late Nights with the Devil btw and it sucked total ass. So disappointed.
Daaaaaaaaamn
Sleepovers do be like that.
It’s true. But also. You must.
That’s my time, maybe there will be more, who gives a shit, everything I do is a pointless waste of time and my toddler is draining the life out of me, goodnight y’all
item.dc:creator: kirbyvictorious

item.title: NAMES Project AIDS Memorial Quilt
item.description: AIDS Memorial Quilt photo: Public Domain AIDS Memorial Quilt on display at the National Mall in Washington, D.C. By National Institutes of Health - en wikipedia - [1], taken from National Institutes of Health website - http://aidshistory.nih.gov/tip_of_the_iceberg/quilt.html, Public Domain, https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?curid=2685602  Sauce: Lynne Yamaguchi Fletcher, The First Gay Pope and Other Records (Boston, MA: Alyson Publications, Inc., 1992), pp. 42, 46. Retold in my own words to avoid plagiarism. “The NAMES Project AIDS Memorial Quilt, often abbreviated to AIDS Memorial Quilt or AIDS Quilt, is a memorial to celebrate the lives of people who have died of AIDS-related causes. Weighing an estimated 54 tons, it is the largest piece of community folk art in the world as of 2020. It was conceived in 1985, during the early years of the AIDS pandemic, when social stigma prevented many AIDS victims from receiving funerals. It has been displayed on the Mall in Washington, D.C., several times. In 2020, it returned to San Francisco, where it is now cared for by the National AIDS Memorial. It can be seen virtually.” https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/NAMES_Project_AIDS_Memorial_Quilt The History of the Quilt https://www.aidsmemorial.org/quilt-history Video Essay the AIDS Memorial Quilt: Origins, Legacy, Futures https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7HsDs3YRRZg
item.dc:creator: oukid
